pending.title: GTA 5 Hulk Vs Spiderman Ragdolls Compilation | (GTA 5 Fails Funny Moments Ragdolls)
pending.description:
The Incredible Hulk and Spiderman are both my favorite Marvel characters but we all know Spiderman would have a really tough time fighting the Hulk! This made me wondering what it would look like if the Hulk tossed the Spiderman around like a ragdoll and so I recorded many hours of my gameplay with the Hulk fighting Spiderman and made this awesome ragdoll compilation! Hulk didn't give Spiderman any chance to even escape in this video! Hope you guys enjoy this ragdoll compilation between the Hulk and Spiderman and be sure to leave a like! Also, subscribe for more videos like this in the future!

Subscribe for more! https://www.youtube.com/user/LoudMouthZander

About this video:

All content on my channel was recorded on GTA 5 and edited on Adobe Premiere by myself (No Reused Content)

Work Time Frame
Recording clips = 2.25 Hours
Rockstar Editor = 3.25 Hours
Adobe Premiere Editing = 3.5 Hours
Thumbnail = 12 minutes
Total Time to make video = 9 Hours 12 minutes

Equipment and Editing Program Used
1) Intel i7 6700hq
2) GTX 1060
3) 16GB of Ram
4) Samsonite Meteor Microphone
5) Bose Comfort 25 ii
6) Rockstar Edtior on GTA 5
7) Adobe Premiere

Hulk toss around Spiderman like a ragdoll...

#Hulk
#HulkSmash
#Spiderman
#HulkvsSpiderman
#GTA5Ragdoll
#GTA5
